scripts.db:up: varlock run -- docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.db:down: varlock run -- docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down
scripts.db:reset: tsx bin/confirm-destructive.ts 'reset graph' && varlock run -- docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v && yarn db:up && yarn db:wait && yarn db:seed
scripts.db:seed: yarn cypher cypher/01-constraints.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/02-indexes.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/03-seed-domains.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/04-seed-tools.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/05-seed-concepts.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/06-seed-systems.cypher && yarn cypher cypher/07-seed-meta-frameworks.cypher
